author: doll-agent
content:
Workspace polish round complete. All deliverables shipped:

**Benchmarks re-run** on current build: 40/55 ferray wins vs NumPy MKL (73 %, up from 23/55 in the previous report). statistical_equivalence.py 47/47 PASS.

**BENCHMARKS.md updated** (363 -> 305 lines, all numbers refreshed for the post-#671..#679 build, fresh date 2026-04-30, NumPy 2.4.4, Rust 1.95). New executive summary highlights the three structural fixes (#677/#678/#679), updated scorecard, fresh per-op tables.

**Version bump 0.2.11 -> 0.3.0**: workspace Cargo.toml + the one stale dev-dep pin in ferray-core-macros (was version="0.2.8"). All 18 member crates now resolve at 0.3.0. Bench binary held at 0.1.0 (not a published crate). CHANGELOG split: post-2026-04-28 GEMM-and-perf entries moved into a new [0.3.0] - 2026-04-30 section organized by Performance / Added (GEMM) / Added (other) / Notes; pre-existing 0.2.11 entries retained verbatim.

**cargo fmt --all** applied (18 files updated).

**cargo clippy --workspace -D warnings** clean across:
- default features
- --features ferray-linalg/bf16
- --features ferray-linalg/f16
- --features ferray-linalg/openblas (validated end-to-end via libopenblas-devel)
- --features ferray-linalg/avx512 has only the documented MSRV-1.89 errors on AVX-512 intrinsics (the feature is opt-in for that exact reason; default builds stay on workspace MSRV 1.85)

**Clippy fixes** (3 in ferray-ma/src/extras.rs, all in tests):
- ma.harden_mask() / ma.soften_mask() returns FerrayResult<()> for API consistency; tests now .unwrap() them
- assert_eq!(default_fill_value_bool(), false) -> assert!(!default_fill_value_bool())

**Dead-code audit**: Removed two pub(crate) legacy aliases in ferray-fft/src/plan.rs (get_cached_real_forward / get_cached_real_inverse) — preserved across a months-old f64-only -> f32+f64 rename refactor (commit bb1a4bff), zero workspace callers, the _f64-suffixed canonical names are the only ones used. Per the user's instruction, these qualified as 'truly dead or obsolete' (transitional shims for a refactor that completed).

The remaining #[allow(unused_imports)] on use openblas_src as _ is correct usage — the import is needed to pull the link directive into the link graph; Rust correctly views the symbol as unused but the linker needs it.

**Verification**: full workspace tests all pass (1500+ tests across 18 crates, 0 failures); cargo clippy -D warnings clean across all default + bf16/f16/openblas feature combos; statistical_equivalence.py 47/47 PASS.

Zero unimplemented!/todo!/panic!("not implemented")/TODO:/FIXME: markers anywhere in /home/doll/ferray/ferray*/src/. Clean polish round.
